section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports a left adnexal mass detected on abdominal exam, with slight tenderness to palpation of the left lower quadrant.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is phrased as a patient-reported finding rather than a documented clinician exam; in this template, patient-reported findings belong in the Subjective section.

section_miscategorizations.text: Genetic counseling and testing are indicated.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is an explicit management recommendation (a plan to pursue genetic counseling/testing), which belongs in the Plan rather than the Assessment.
